ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the customer information was last updated */,
  "newsletter_subscription" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to newsletters */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Total tax applied to the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("shipping_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "discountApplied" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal for the item after discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (LxWxH) */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category for nested categories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_category_map" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the shipping address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the shipping address */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the shipping address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_options" (
  "shipping_option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping option */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping option */,
  "estimated_delivery_days" INTEGER /* Estimated delivery time in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_shipping" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "shipping_option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping option */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_shipping_shipping_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_option_id") REFERENCES shipping_options ("shipping_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "status_date")
)
